name: King Ranch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 10 oz ROTEL Tomato with Green Chili
12 Corn Tortillas, crumbled into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Stew chicken with salt, pepper, and bay leaf until cooked through.
2. Remove the chicken from the cooking liquid and allow it to cool slightly.
3. Cut the cooled chicken into bite-size pieces.
4. In a large saucepan, cook green peppers and onions in butter over medium heat until tender.
5. Stir in the cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, ROTEL tomato with green chili, tortillas (crumbled), chicken pieces, and half of the shredded cheese.
6. Repeat layering process two more times, using one-third of all remaining ingredients each time.
7. Transfer the layered mixture to a 3-quart shallow baking dish.
8. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes or until hot and bubbly and the cheese is browned.
9. Serve and enjoy! This recipe serves 10-12 people and can be frozen before or after baking.
